series_metadata.series_description: Electronic files that are sent to the Trust department by either a custodial bank or a custodial fund. Depending on the fund and portfolio type, such reconciliations are performed on either a weekly or monthly basis. In these files, the custodial banks and custodial funds are reconciling their records against each other and identifying any discrepancies.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
